permissionCopy.locationWhenInUsePermission: Canopy Trove uses your location to find nearby dispensaries and let you share how your visit was when you arrive.
permissionCopy.photosPermission: Canopy Trove uses your photos so you can attach review images that stay private until moderation approves them.
permissionCopy.cameraPermission: Canopy Trove uses your camera so you can take review photos before they enter the private moderation queue.

launchNote: The repo folder name does not ship. Android packaging uses the package name, launcher label, icons, and app config above.
